justification: Hebrew פֶּרֶץ (Perets) = breach/breakthrough. KJV used Greek-influenced "Pharez". Restoring to original Hebrew pronunciation.
Lineage of David through Perez. Same Hebrew פֶּרֶץ.
Sons of Perez: Hezron and Hamul.
Inhabitants of Jerusalem from children of Perez.
Military commanders from children of Perez.
Sons of Perez that dwelt at Jerusalem.
Genealogy of Jesus Christ: "Judas begat Phares" → "Judah begat Perez". CRITICAL: This is the royal bloodline of Christ.
Genealogy of Jesus through David through Perez. Same restoration.
Clan name: "the family of the Pharzites" → "the family of the Perezites"
Numbering of the sons of Perez.
MENE MENE TEKEL UPHARSIN — PERES: "Thy kingdom is divided." פְּרֵס = Perez. The name on the wall, written by the finger of God. This is the Commander's authority.
